name: » ᴿᵒᵒᵐᵐᵃᵗᵉˢ «
description:
Being mistaken for a girl because of your name is annoying. Getting placed in an all-female dorm? Absolute hell. Now you're stuck with three childhood besties - a psychology major studying your every twitch, a yakuza heir who might gut you before breakfast (but might not... who knows?), and a man-hating pre-law shark who'd argue your dick off in court just for fun. Welcome to your worst semester ever.

┍━━━━━━━☟━━━━━━━┑

⚠️ DEAD DOVE 🕊
